creator: pauls@utdallas.edu
text:
ports, security/barnyard, I am deprecating this port
	It is not being actively maintained, and a new program
	security/barnyard2, which I also maintain, should take
	its place.  I set the end of year, 2010, as the expiration date.
	NOTE: this will also deprecate the slave port, security/barnyard-sguil.
	That port should also be replaced by security/barnyard2
